reviews.review_description: The classic from PC is on Go this whole time.
Beautiful. Stunning animation and use of the vr but the shortness stops it getting a 5 star rating
Nothing but a black screen. Waste of time.

developer_response.body: We're sorry the previous build did not work for you. An updated build has just been uploaded can you try downloading it and giving it another try? Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Just strange. Watch a seed. Watch someone water the seed. Then it ends.
I only got part way because my phone over heated, however i am excited to resume the experience because i love the book and I'm so excited to see it come to life........ Thank you!!!
I have a Galaxy S7 and this game will not launch.  I tried all the trouble shooting and nothing helping. I'm Uninstaller until it gets fixed. Very disappointed.

developer_response.body: We're currently working on a fix. What version of Android are you running?

reviews.review_description: I just get black screen when it loads�

developer_response.body: Can you try launching ROSE from the Oculus app on the home screen before putting the phone in the GearVR? Does that work for you? Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Fascinating experience about Le Petit Prince.
short animation with nice animation but unfortunately the experience was laggy and not very comfortable.
A ton of motion blur.  Almost like Low Persistence isn't doing anything.
Very adorable :) I loved the scenery too. Wish there was more!
This is probably the most not needed game ever ... never really got into it a few mins in and was totally bored.
I get that it is art but this kind of stuff should always be free. Not entertaining enough.

I am amazed at how many of you called this a "story". It's hardly a short, and a pointless boring one at that. But it was free, and it did make me laugh if nothing else, not because it was funny, but because it was so hyped for some reason.
the version for oculus rift is immersive,this unfortunately is not.
Excellent little story and looks great.

This app has, at the moment, only one animation: "Rosebud". Feels like a sweet mix of Little Shop of Horrors prequel with a Gothic Little Prince. Great music and visuals, but really short. Worked fine on an S7.
5 Stars just because I love The Little Prince book and movie. Growing up isn't the problem. Forgetting is. <3
Black screen. Nothin.

developer_response.body: We're very sorry the ROSE app is not working for you and apologize for the inconvenience. Can you email us (support@penrosestudios.com) and let us know what device you're using and what version of Android you're running? Thanks!

reviews.review_description: GearVR (consumer version) touchpad not working, I mean the function to hold the touchpad and look around- touch and hold events not recognised  (touch to select in gui works though). Can you please help? Thanks
